headline: Bitcoin Plummets to $50K Amid Looming Liquidity Crisis

article.title: Bitcoin tipped for Q3 'macro bottom' near $50K as major liquidity grab looms
article.summary: Bitcoin market participants may be left in "complete disbelief" as the market reverses from a liquidity grab without another major leg lower, a trader predicted.

headline: Bitcoin Hits 90% of Record High on Microtransaction Surge

article.title: Bitcoin activity nears record highs on microtransaction surge
article.summary: Near-record OP_RETURN usage is driving a surge in low-value Bitcoin transactions, pushing Bitcoin network activity close to all-time highs despite muted price action.

headline: Jio Platforms Files $10B India IPO Listing

article.title: Ambani’s Jio Platforms Files For Long-Awaited India IPO
article.summary: Jio Platforms Ltd., a crown jewel of billionaire Mukesh Ambani’s oil-to-retail conglomerate, filed draft listing documents on Friday, starting the process of unlocking shareholder value in one of India’s most-anticipated initial public offerings.

headline: Stocks Sink 2% as Iran Talks Stall

article.title: Stocks Slide as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.

headline: Franklin Templeton Seeks ETFs Converting 50% Dividends to Bitcoin

article.title: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
article.summary: The asset manager's two proposed "Bitcoin DRIP" funds would hold U.S. stocks and reinvest dividends into Bitcoin, a novel ETF structure.

headline: China's Z.AI Overtakes Nvidia with $5.2M Model Launch
